description:
Monitor your Claude Code sessions in real time, right from your iPhone.

Codync is the companion app for developers who use Claude Code on their Mac. Get instant visibility into your AI coding sessions — status, costs, tasks, and context — all synced automatically through iCloud.

LIVE ACTIVITIES & DYNAMIC ISLAND
See your active sessions on your Lock Screen and Dynamic Island without unlocking your phone. Choose between two display modes:
• Overall Mode — a unified dashboard showing all sessions at a glance
• Individual Mode — separate activity cards for each session

REAL-TIME SESSION MONITORING
• Track session status: working, idle, needs input, completed, or error
• See which AI model is running (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku)
• Monitor token costs in real time
• View task progress and current tool activity
• Check context window usage percentage

SEAMLESS iCLOUD SYNC
Zero configuration required. Codync syncs all session data from your Mac through iCloud automatically. Just sign in and go.

PRIMARY SESSION CONTROL
Pin your most important session as "primary" for priority placement in Live Activities and notifications.

CODYNC PRO ($0.99/month)
• Background push updates — Live Activities stay current even when the app is closed
• Always-on Dynamic Island — persistent session status on your Lock Screen
• Instant APNs delivery — real-time updates with zero delay

Perfect for developers running long AI coding tasks who want to stay informed on the go.
promotionalText: Monitor Claude Code sessions in real time with Live Activities, Dynamic Island, and instant push notifications. Stay informed while away from your Mac.
